scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n site,api,app -c magenta,blue,green "npm run dev:site" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:app"
scripts.build: npm run build:site && npm run build:api && npm run build:app
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @edusync/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @edusync/app && npm run typecheck --workspace @edusync/site
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run audit
